crust.ex: The planet has a thin rocky crust.

crutch.def: 拐杖、支撐、胯部、支撐、支柱

crystal.ex: The water in the lake is crystal clear.

cub.def: 幼獸、新手、幼年偵察兵、產子

cube.ex: Cut the cheese into small cubes.

cucumber.ex: He remains as cool as a cucumber under pressure.

cue.def: 暗示、提示、信號、長隊、撞球杆、給予暗示、提示

cultivation.ex: The land is under intensive cultivation.

cumbersome.ex: The equipment is very cumbersome to move.

cumulative.ex: The cumulative effect of smoking is serious.

cunning.ex: He has a very cunning plan.

cupboard.ex: The dishes are in the kitchen cupboard.

curious.ex: I am curious about his background.

curl.ex: She has natural curls in her hair.

curriculum.ex: The school has a very broad curriculum.

curry.def: 咖哩、梳理、用咖哩調味、塗抹、梳(馬)毛、討好

curse.def: 詛咒、咒罵、禍根、咒語、咒罵、詛咒、折磨

curtail.ex: The government decided to curtail spending.

curvy.ex: Be careful on that curvy road.

cushion.ex: She sat on a soft cushion.

custody.ex: The child is in the custody of his mother.

custom.def: 習俗、海關、關稅、常規、定製的、海關的

customize.ex: You can customize the software to meet your needs.

customs.ex: It took an hour to pass through customs.

cynical.def: 憤世嫉俗的、冷嘲熱諷的、懷疑的

dag.ex: He is a bit of a dag.

dagger.ex: He drew his dagger from its sheath.

daily.col: daily routine, daily life, daily bread

damsel.ex: He saved the damsel in distress.

dandruff.ex: He has a lot of dandruff on his shoulders.

danger.ex: The sign warned of the danger of falling rocks.

dare.ex: How dare you speak to me like that!

daring.def: 大膽的、勇敢的、勇氣、膽量
daring.ex: The soldiers performed a daring rescue.

dark.def: 黑暗、深色、夜、黑暗的、深色的、模糊的、盲目的、秘密的、無知地、偷偷地

darkness.ex: Lights were shining in the darkness.

database.ex: The information is stored in a computer database.

date.col: out of date, up to date, blind date

daylight.ex: The robbery happened in broad daylight.
